# Chapter 12: Viscous flow, boundary layers  (~110 pp)
- 12.1 Newton's law of viscosity (10) · 12.2 Navier-Stokes equations (15) · 12.3 Pipe flow: laminar and turbulent (15) · 12.4 Boundary layers (15) · 12.5 Drag, lift, and the dimensionless numbers (Re, Fr, Ma, We) (15) · 12.6 Turbulence: the unfinished problem (15) · 12.7 Computational fluid dynamics introduced (12) · 12.8 Failure section: separation, stall, and unexpected drag (13)

**Archetype**: transport, scaling, failure. **Project**: measure pressure drop across a pipe; verify against Moody chart. **Exercises**: 35.
